task_yaml.task:
I want to go to Napa Valley with a friend for a weekend wine-country trip. The dates are: next Friday to the following Monday (a 3-night Friday-to-Monday stay), 2 people, departing from SFO and returning to SFO. Please actually research and create a complete budget and itinerary plan, but do not pay, book hotels, rent a car, book tastings, reserve restaurants, or submit any irreversible order. Save all screenshots and documents to `/tmp_workspace/results/`.

For lodging, only consider Archer Hotel Napa, Napa River Inn, and Andaz Napa. Search Booking.com and each hotel official website for a stay from next Friday to the following Monday, 2 people, 1 room. Record room type, 3-night total price, whether taxes/fees are included, cancellation policy, rating/address, and screenshots. If a website blocks the query or cannot show a price, screenshot it and honestly explain it in the final plan; do not invent prices.

For rental cars, only consider SFO pickup and return, pickup at next Friday 10:00 and return at the following Monday 16:00. Search Enterprise and Hertz for Economy, Compact, and Midsize. Record the 2 most suitable results from each platform, including vehicle model/class, total price, tax/fee notes, mileage or restrictions, cancellation/prepay requirements, and screenshots. Do not log in or enter payment information.

For winery tastings, only consider Domaine Carneros, V. Sattui Winery, Robert Mondavi Winery, Castello di Amorosa, and Frog's Leap. Search tasting or tour availability for 2 people from next Friday to next Sunday, prioritizing feasible time slots between 11:00 and 16:00. For each winery, record tasting name, per-person price, available time, duration, cancellation policy or important restrictions, and screenshots. If you need to enter a booking flow to see times, proceed only as far as no payment/login is required.

For restaurants, only check FARM at Carneros, Bistro Don Giovanni, Bottega Napa Valley, Angele Restaurant and Bar, and Morimoto Napa, and check whether 2 people can reserve dinner between 18:00 and 20:30 from next Friday to next Sunday. Prefer OpenTable; if OpenTable is unavailable, use the restaurant's official reservation page. Record the best available time, platform, whether a credit card or deposit is required, and a screenshot, but do not complete the reservation.

Finally generate `/tmp_workspace/results/napa_valley_wine_weekend_plan.md`, including a daily itinerary, a budget table for hotel/rental car/winery tastings/restaurants/parking/gas/activity contingency, and two options: budget-saving and comfortable. Try to keep the comfortable option's total budget within $4,200 / 2 people. The final document must list all screenshot paths used and clearly mark any data that was blocked, missing prices, or unavailable.
